About SODIC

SODIC is a leading real estate developer in Egypt with over three decades of proven success across West Cairo, East Cairo, and the North Coast. Guided by a customer-first approach, we create sustainable, mixed-use communities that set new benchmarks of quality for all our stakeholders. Today, these communities are home to over 30,000 residents.

Deliveries Ahead of Schedule

Developing Diverse, Sustainable, Future-Ready Communities

SODIC is a leading real estate developer in Egypt with over three decades of proven success in real estate development across West Cairo, East Cairo, and the North Coast.

Guided by a customer-first approach, we create sustainable, mixed-use communities that set new benchmarks of quality. Today, these communities are home to over 30,000 residents.

Learn More
North Coast
East Cairo
West Cairo

Caesar

Caesar is home to one of Egypt’s most stunning bays with over 1.2 km of pristine beachfront. Built on terraced levels for uninterrupted views of the Mediterranean and designed with simplicity at its heart, Caesar captures the essence of simple, nostalgic summers with understated luxury living in Egypt and natural beauty.

Discoverabout CaesarSee Allabout all our developments

June

June is one of our coastal developments on Egypt’s North Coast, with a sandy beach and pristine seawater. The Miami-inspired development offers diverse neighborhoods, hotel-serviced apartments, chalets and villas. It features swimmable lagoons, horizon pools, and unique hospitality concepts, including the Michelin-recognized Cavalarica, Dubai-born Surf Club, and the first Marriott Tribute Portfolio hotel on Egypt’s North Coast. June adds a distinctive summer destination to SODIC’s portfolio.

Discoverabout JuneSee Allabout all our developments

Ogami

Inspired by Japan’s serene Ogami Island, this design-led signature development redefines coastal living on Egypt’s North Coast. Spanning 440 acres with over 11 km of lagoon shoreline and an 800-meter sandy beach, Ogami offers neighborhoods where families can connect, unwind, and embrace a lifestyle shaped by thoughtful design and natural beauty.

Discoverabout OgamiSee Allabout all our developments

Our Latest Updates

See all

News

12 October 2025

MIDAR Signs Agreement with SODIC to Develop Egypt’s First Fully Integrated Wellness and Sustainable Community in "MADA"

MIDAR for Investment and Urban Development, the master developer of "Mostakbal City" and "MADA" in New Cairo, has signed a partnership agreement with Sixth of October Development and Investment Company - SODIC to develop a fully Integrated residential project within "MADA", with total investments amounting to EGP 110 billion.

Learn More

News

4 August 2025

SODIC Announces the Official Opening of Nobu North Coast at Ogami

The world-renowned lifestyle brand makes its highly anticipated Egyptian debut at Ogami, SODIC’s signature development on the North Coast.

Learn More

News

23 July 2025

SODIC Debuts Cavalariça North Coast at June

Cavalariça brings its soulful dining and Michelin-recognized hospitality concept to the region for the first time with a new home at June by SODIC.

Learn More

News

20 July 2025

SODIC’s Ogami Wins “Master Plan of the Year” at Architecture Leaders Awards 2025

SODIC is proud to announce that Ogami, its 440-acre signature development on the North Coast, has been named “Master Plan of the Year” at the Architecture Leaders Awards 2025.

Learn More

News

14 July 2025

SODIC Delivers June ahead of Schedule

SODIC announces the early delivery of the first homes at June, its Miami-inspired, vibrant beachfront destination on the North Coast. The milestone reinforces SODIC’s longstanding track record of delivering ahead of schedule and reflects its unwavering commitment to quality and timely delivery across its developments.

Learn More

News

17 June 2025

SODIC Delivers VYE 6 Months ahead of Schedule

SODIC announces the early delivery of VYE its pioneering next-generation development in New Zayed, reinforcing its stellar reputation for timely and ahead-of-schedule delivery, maintained for nearly three decades.

Learn More

At SODIC, sustainability is a guiding principle shaping how we plan, build, and grow. Our vision is a better tomorrow built on inclusivity and progress, focusing on responsible development, ensuring that every community contributes to lasting economic, environmental, and social impact.

We commit to lasting impact, building not just homes but environments where people can truly thrive.

01 \ 05

Energy Efficiency

We prioritize smart design, clean energy, and efficient systems working together to power more responsible community living.

02 \ 05

Water Conservation

By combining efficient irrigation, wastewater recycling, and technology-driven water management, we build communities that conserve water today and sustain for tomorrow.

03 \ 05

Green Spaces

Each of our residential and commercial developments integrates natural beauty into daily life, fostering wellness and inspiring healthier living.

04 \ 05

Community Engagement

Through meaningful initiatives and genuine engagement, we aim to create a positive, lasting impact on every community.

05 \ 05

Sustainable Materials

Through responsible sourcing of materials and sustainable building, we reduce environmental impact and deliver resilient developments.
